text:
Created attachment 222978
Screen depicting the problem

Hi, based on discussion I had with developer on 

https://forum.netgate.com/topic/161637/x-540-t2-didn-t-boot-up-on-pfsense-ce-2-5-0-release-amd64/6

We saw that this ethernet card is not supported in 12.2-STABLE.

https://ark.intel.com/content/www/pl/pl/ark/products/58954/intel-ethernet-converged-network-adapter-x540-t2.html

Can this be improved in future ?

https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src/blob/master/sys/dev/ixgbe/ixgbe_type.h#L85

https://pci-ids.ucw.cz/read/PC/8086


Thank you.
